A B H I J E E T P A T H A K
P R O F I L E S U M M A R Y
Security Professional with 5 years of expertise in advanced Penetration Testing across Web, Network, GenAI,
Mobile, and APIs, with a proven specialization in infrastructure and emerging technologies. My core expertise
includes executing comprehensive Active Directory penetration tests, uncovering multiple paths to domain
compromise, and leading network segmentation reviews utilizing industry tools like Nessus and Nipper to
evaluate critical network components. I actively address emerging threats by spearheading GenAI Penetration
Testing for multiple clients, including chatbots, and collaborating on cloud security initiatives and infrastructure
assessments. I leverage Bash and Python scripting to develop multiple internal automation scripts and Burp
extensions—such as an SQLi detector and JS analysis tools—significantly enhancing team efficiency and
product capabilities, including an AI-powered reporting algorithm for a company security product (GAP). This
technical proficiency is complemented by demonstrated leadership, including leading advanced technical
interview loops for consultant candidates and training newly hired peers. My proven track record of finding
critical flaws is evidenced by a personal CVE (CVE-2022-4314) and 50+ Hall of Fame/Bug Bounty awards from
major companies.

Offensive Senior Security Consultant | Kroll
Conducted comprehensive penetration testing across web applications, mobile platforms, and APIs for
diverse clients, including those in the banking, telecommunications, and cloud services sectors.
Led security configuration reviews and network segmentation assessments, utilizing both manual

Collaborated as an integral member of a cloud service provider's internal security team, focusing on cloud

Executed both internal and external infrastructure security assessments, identifying vulnerabilities and
recommending mitigation strategies.
Performed thorough code reviews using a combination of manual analysis and automated tools to identify
and rectify security flaws.
Led client-facing meetings, including Project Kick-Offs (PKOs), status updates, and readout calls, ensuring

Initiated and implemented team-wide reporting enhancements, resulting in improved clarity and

Led threat modeling initiatives to systematically identify and assess potential security risks, guiding the

Took the lead in training newly hired peers, ensuring they were well-prepared and confident in their roles
from day one.
Performed GenAI Penetration Testing for multiple clients, including chatbots, downstream services, and
vibe coding agents.
Conducted Active Directory reviews and penetration test assessments for multiple clients, uncovering
multiple paths to compromise the domain.
Developed multiple internal automation scripts and Burp extensions to enhance team efficiency, including
JS analysis tools, code review tools, NPM dependencies analysis tools, and an SQLi detector.
Contributed to the company's security product, GAP, to enhance its capabilities by adding new security
checks and developing an AI-powered, fully automatic reporting and correlation algorithm.
Led technical interview loops for consultant candidates, specializing in evaluating hands-on skills in
penetration testing to ensure a high standard of technical proficiency.
